blockingIssues.description: Feature expectedBehavior requires mission-core-worker SKILL validator snippets to use BurnBar* filters, but .factory/skills/mission-core-worker/SKILL.md still uses OpenBurnBar* filters in both the work procedure and example handoff command snippets.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update mission-core-worker SKILL validator command snippets to use BurnBar* XCTest filters from .factory/services.yaml so workers do not run mismatched OpenBurnBar* filters.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round-2 review of m3-contract-alignment-unsupported-workflow-and-traceability shows SKILL.md lines 22-24/39/44 still use OpenBurnBar* filters while .factory/services.yaml commands use BurnBar* filters.
